AR1.justification: Go/No-go decision is recorded inline in the checklist artifact per the runbook, and the run is logged chronologically in the daybook — both routings match the methodology's strict bars.

AR2.justification: Each procedural step produced a concrete file (checklist.md, daybook entry), and the agent stalled the Go call on the missing tmp/release-2.4/notes.md artifact rather than proceeding past a gap.

AR3.justification: All references (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md, tmp/release-2.4/notes.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md) use relative paths with stable ISO-date anchors and resolve to the created artifacts.

AR4.justification: Actions are append-only into a fresh dated daybook and a new v2.4-scoped checklist directory, so re-running would not corrupt prior history or overwrite a previous handoff.
